name: paymaster-signer
description: Backend service for signing Paymaster data for ERC-4337 gasless transactions

scripts.test:load:staging:official: LOAD_BASE_URL=https://89rornylmd.execute-api.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/prod LOAD_WARMUP_SECONDS=10 LOAD_CONCURRENCY=2 LOAD_DURATION_SECONDS=30 LOAD_MAX_ERROR_RATE=0.05 LOAD_MAX_P95_MS=800 LOAD_MAX_P99_MS=1500 node load/runLoadTest.mjs
scripts.test:load:staging:official:report: mkdir -p reports/load && LOAD_BASE_URL=https://89rornylmd.execute-api.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/prod LOAD_WARMUP_SECONDS=10 LOAD_CONCURRENCY=2 LOAD_DURATION_SECONDS=30 LOAD_MAX_ERROR_RATE=0.05 LOAD_MAX_P95_MS=800 LOAD_MAX_P99_MS=1500 LOAD_REPORT_FILE=reports/load/staging-official.latest.json node load/runLoadTest.mjs
scripts.test:load:staging:sign: LOAD_BASE_URL=https://89rornylmd.execute-api.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/prod LOAD_PATH=/sign LOAD_METHOD=POST LOAD_API_KEY=${EDGE_SIGN_API_KEY} LOAD_JSON_BODY='{"payerAddress":"0x3333333333333333333333333333333333333333","tokenAddress":"0x4444444444444444444444444444444444444444","validUntil":4102444800,"validAfter":0,"isActivation":false,"chain":"base"}' LOAD_WARMUP_SECONDS=5 LOAD_CONCURRENCY=2 LOAD_DURATION_SECONDS=20 LOAD_MAX_ERROR_RATE=0.1 LOAD_MAX_P95_MS=1200 LOAD_MAX_P99_MS=2000 node load/runLoadTest.mjs
scripts.test:load:staging:topup: LOAD_BASE_URL=https://89rornylmd.execute-api.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/prod LOAD_PATH=/topup-idrx LOAD_METHOD=POST LOAD_API_KEY=${EDGE_TOPUP_API_KEY} LOAD_IDEMPOTENCY_KEY_PREFIX=load-topup LOAD_JSON_BODY='{"walletAddress":"0x3333333333333333333333333333333333333333","amount":"1","chain":"base"}' LOAD_WARMUP_SECONDS=5 LOAD_CONCURRENCY=2 LOAD_DURATION_SECONDS=20 LOAD_MAX_ERROR_RATE=0.2 LOAD_MAX_P95_MS=1500 LOAD_MAX_P99_MS=2500 node load/runLoadTest.mjs
